prompt: Create a side-by-side two-panel meme. first image as the left panel with caption: 'MONDAY MORNING ENERGY'. second image as the right panel with the label the list: 1) Cry 2)Procrastinate 3)Existential dread. Use handwritten-style black font on the to-do list, and meme-style white text top-aligned in each panel.
prompt_refined: Generate a side-by-side two-panel meme. The left panel should feature the visual elements of image 1, depicting Mona Lisa with messy hair, and have the white, top-aligned, meme-style text 'MONDAY MORNING ENERGY'. The right panel should incorporate the visual elements of image 2, showing Patrick Star holding a 'To-Do List' paper. On this 'To-Do List' paper, add a vertical, numbered list in a handwritten-style black font: '1) Cry', '2) Procrastinate', '3) Existential dread'.
objects: white, top-aligned, meme-style text 'MONDAY MORNING ENERGY'
vertical, numbered list in handwritten-style black font: '1) Cry', '2) Procrastinate', '3) Existential dread' on the 'To-Do List' paper
